overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival horror game depicting a character in a green jacket exploring a fog-shrouded abandoned town street. The scene features heavy atmospheric fog, derelict vehicles including a police SUV and burned-out structures, creating an eerie, desolate atmosphere.

small white guard booth with external staircase

segments.scene_description: Having passed through the gate, the character walks along a deserted suburban street lined with utility poles and sparse trees, passing a yellow fire hydrant as the parking lot vehicles fade into the fog behind.

segments.scene_description: The character continues down the foggy street, passing a rusted abandoned station wagon and approaching a burned-out bus structure with a nearby dumpster, while utility poles continue to line the left side of the road.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a desolate, fog-shrouded town that transitions from a restricted parking area into a derelict suburban street. It begins with the character navigating a foggy lot past a police SUV and a black muscle car, moving steadily toward a chain-link fence and a guard booth. As the character passes through the gate, the scene opens onto a deserted road lined with utility poles and sparse trees, leaving the initial vehicles to fade into the thick gray mist. The camera then continues down the street, passing a yellow fire hydrant and a rusted station wagon before approaching a burned-out bus and a nearby dumpster. Finally, the path leads around an abandoned sedan and traffic cones toward a delivery truck, where a woman in a red jacket suddenly appears on the left side of the frame.
